The [[Nen-Carvon]] '''R-444 Imperial Sky Swooper''' was the company's first entry into the [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsor]] drive craft field. Based on the [[para-wing glider]]s used on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], it had a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] mounted above the pilot. The glider capability meant that the noise level was low for a repulsor craft, making them suitable for deployment by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] stealth raids, and for patrols in variable terrain areas such as the forest world of [[Aris/Legends|Aris]] and the canyons of [[Ebra]]. The R-444 was controlled by using the leg rest bar and hand grips attached to the wings. Flight was fairly simple, especially at low speed, and thanks to the repulsor unit, long distances could be covered easily. The pilot used both hands and their legs to steer, which made it difficult to use the blaster.
